# stem·spark

stem·spark is a free directory for women in STEM. It curates scholarships, courses,
mentorship platforms, organizations, conferences, job boards, communities, books,
podcasts, documentaries, and impact statistics.

Primary URLs:

- https://wis.praks.me/
- https://wis.praks.me/resources
- https://wis.praks.me/learning
- https://wis.praks.me/impact
- https://wis.praks.me/media
- https://wis.praks.me/about

Source code:

- https://github.com/itsmepraks/womeninstem

Owner:

- Prakriti Bista
- https://praks.me
